text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking down the<n>hallway...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
All that's left to prepare for the new<n>trainer
orientation is the handouts.<n>That should be it for
today's work.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I almost forgot to feed Director<n>Akikawa's
cat! But even if I head to<n>her office now...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer?! Oh, how embarrassing for<n>you to see
me like this!
choice_data_list: I can run to the director's office for you!
I can help you with the handouts!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much! Only if you're really<n>sure it's
okay, though.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Her cat's been eating a lot lately. The<n>director
has even been complaining of<n>a sore neck from
carrying it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
So please don't give it too much food!<n>No matter
how cute it acts!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now that I think about it... It<n>feels like just
yesterday I was<n>showing you the ropes...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And look at you now! You're a truly<n>splendid
trainer with a trainee of your<n>own!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Please provide the same support to<n>all the new
trainers in the future!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Tazuna has a lot of<n>responsibilities
aside from being the<n>director's secretary.
choice_data_list: Don't you think you're a little too busy?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you worried about me? Hehe...<n>I
appreciate your concern.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But I assure you, I'm perfectly fine!<n>I'm
confident in my physical fitness,<n>and most
importantly...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Being able to help Umamusume and<n>their trainers
alike brings me more joy<n>than anything else.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's work, of course, but it's also a<n>way of life
for me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In her smile, I can feel the great<n>amount of love
Tazuna has for what<n>she does.
